risks: Consumption plan (Y1) has cold-start latency and a 5–10 minute execution timeout; CPU-intensive PDF conversions may exceed this limit
Azure Functions best practices mandate Flex Consumption (FC1) over Y1 Dynamic; Y1 is explicitly discouraged for new deployments
No network isolation — all services (Key Vault, Cosmos DB, Storage) have publicNetworkAccess enabled with no VNet integration or private endpoints

Missing RBAC role assignments for managed identity to access Storage (Blob Data Owner, Blob Data Contributor, Queue Data Contributor, Table Data Contributor), Key Vault (Secrets User), and Cosmos DB (Built-in Data Contributor)
Storage account local auth (shared key access) is not disabled, contradicting security best practices
Single-region deployment (eastus) with LRS storage and single-region Serverless Cosmos DB — no failover or disaster recovery strategy
Cosmos DB Serverless is capped at approximately 5,000 RU/s peak throughput — may bottleneck under sustained high load
No diagnostic settings (Microsoft.Insights/diagnosticSettings) defined for the Function App
correctionsRecommended: Upgrade App Service Plan from Consumption (Y1) to Flex Consumption (FC1) with functionAppConfig and deployment.storage configuration per Azure Functions best practices

Add explicit Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments resources: Storage Blob Data Owner (b7e6dc6d-f1e8-4753-8033-0f276bb0955b), Storage Blob Data Contributor (ba92f5b4-2d11-453d-a403-e96b0029c9fe), Storage Queue Data Contributor (974c5e8b-45b9-4653-ba55-5f855dd0fb88), Storage Table Data Contributor (0a9a7e1f-b9d0-4cc4-a60d-0319b160aaa3), and Monitoring Metrics Publisher (3913510d-42f4-4e42-8a64-420c390055eb) for the user-assigned managed identity on the storage account
Add Key Vault Secrets User role assignment for the managed identity to enable Key Vault reference resolution in Function App app settings
Add Cosmos DB Built-in Data Contributor role assignment for the managed identity on the Cosmos DB account
Disable storage account local auth by setting allowSharedKeyAccess to false
Add Microsoft.Insights/diagnosticSettings resource for the Function App to send logs to the Log Analytics workspace
Consider adding VNet integration (requires Premium or Flex Consumption plan) and private endpoints for Key Vault, Cosmos DB, and Storage for production hardening
Consider upgrading storage redundancy from LRS to ZRS for higher durability
hardDependencies: Function App requires RBAC role assignments on the Storage account for the user-assigned managed identity (Storage Blob Data Owner, Blob Data Contributor, Queue Data Contributor, Table Data Contributor) — without these the Function App runtime will fail to initialize
Key Vault references in Function App app settings require Key Vault Secrets User role assignment for the managed identity — without this the app settings will fail to resolve at startup
